title: It’s primetime for conspiracy theorist video creators
summary: Following the White House Correspondents' Dinner shooting, conspiracy theory videos claiming a false flag operation have proliferated, reflecting how reaction video culture is reshaping social media's content landscape.
content:
In the days since this year's White House Correspondents' Dinner was cut short when shots were fired at the event, there has been a boom of conspiracy theory videos created by people who insist that the entire situation was a false flag operation. These kinds of theories are nothing new, but the way they're spreading now is a reflection of how reaction video culture is reshaping our social media landscape. And even though the initial chaos around the shooting has started to die down, content creators are still posting about what "really" happened.  
There is still much we do not know about Cole Allen, the 31-year-old suspected shooter who a …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 阴谋论视频创作者的黄金时段
zh.summary: 在白宫记者晚宴枪击事件后，声称虚假旗帜行动的阴谋论视频激增，反映了反应视频文化如何重塑社交媒体的内容格局。

title: Elon Musk appeared more petty than prepared
summary: Musk testified in his lawsuit against OpenAI, appearing flat and unprepared compared to his previous court appearances, spending considerable time on self-promotion rather than clearly presenting his case.
content:
Today the first witness was sworn in in Musk v. Altman: Elon Musk. I was surprised by how flat he seemed.
This is not the first time I've seen Musk in court. During his defamation suit, he turned on the charm and the jury responded by finding him not guilty. Today he looked adrift and unprepared. The only times he showed real animation were when he was bragging about how much he'd done for OpenAI.
The direct examination is a way of telling a story through questions; it's important to make the narrative clear. For a suit that accuses Sam Altman of straying from OpenAI's mission, Musk spent a weird amount of time talking about himself, recou …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 埃隆·穆斯克显得更加小气而非准备充分
zh.summary: 穆斯克在他对OpenAI的诉讼中作证，与他之前的法庭出庭相比，显得平淡且准备不足，花费了大量时间进行自我宣传而不是清楚地陈述他的案件。

title: Anti-Trump Instagram pic of seashells now enough to indict ex-FBI directors
summary: Former FBI Director James Comey faced federal indictment related to an Instagram post containing a seashell photo arrangement, reflecting escalating political tensions and legal challenges.
content: The clown car is all gassed up.

zh.title: 反特朗普贝壳Instagram照片现已足以起诉前FBI局长

title: James Comey indicted over Instagram seashell photo that allegedly threatened Trump
summary: Former FBI Director James Comey was indicted by the DOJ for an Instagram post showing seashells arranged as "8647," which prosecutors claim could be interpreted as threatening Trump, referencing the slang term "eighty-six."
content:
The US Department of Justice has once again indicted James Comey - this time, for an alleged threat the former FBI director made toward President Donald Trump on Instagram, as reported earlier by CNN. In its indictment, filed in a North Carolina federal court on Tuesday, the DOJ cites the now-deleted image Comey posted to Instagram last May, which showed a seashell arrangement making up the numbers "8647."
The DOJ claims "a reasonable recipient who is familiar with the circumstances would interpret as a serious expression of an intent to do harm." The phrase "eighty-six" can be used as slang that means to "get rid of" or "throw out," accord …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 詹姆斯·科米因涉嫌威胁特朗普的Instagram贝壳照片被起诉
zh.summary: 前FBI局长詹姆斯·科米因一条显示贝壳排列成"8647"的Instagram帖子被司法部起诉，检察官声称这可能被解释为威胁特朗普，涉及"eighty-six"这个俚语。

title: Elon Musk tells the jury that all he wants to do is save humanity
summary: During his OpenAI trial testimony, Musk positioned himself as a humanitarian savior, spending considerable time on his origin story from South Africa to his various companies rather than focusing on the core dispute with Sam Altman.
content:
On the stand, Elon Musk is positioning himself as a savior.
In the high-profile trial between him and his fellow OpenAI co-founder, now CEO, Sam Altman, Musk opened by going through his background. He went as far back as being raised in South Africa and arriving in Canada for college with "2,500 in Canadian travelers' checks and a bag of clothes and books," then spent an unusually long time talking about his past, from Zip2 to PayPal to the current, more familiar slate of companies he now runs.
Why is Musk giving the jury so much of his origin story? Though he may be, depending on the day, the world's wealthiest individual, Musk suggested  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 埃隆·马斯克告诉陪审团他只想拯救人类
zh.summary: 在OpenAI诉讼作证中，马斯克将自己定位为人道主义救世主，花了大量时间讲述他从南非到创办各家公司的起源故事，而不是专注于与山姆·奥尔特曼的核心争议。

title: Taylor Swift is stepping up the legal war on AI copycats
summary: Taylor Swift filed trademark applications to protect two spoken phrases—"Hey, it's Taylor Swift" and "Hey, it's Taylor"—as part of escalating legal efforts against AI voice cloning and deepfakes.
content:
Taylor Swift has been at the center of AI imitation controversies for years, and now, she's become the latest celebrity who's escalating attempts to protect herself from AI copycats. As usual, however, the legal system intersects with technology in complicated ways - and Swift's efforts may be a long shot.
In trademark applications filed last week, Swift's team asked for protection for two phrases spoken by the singer: "Hey, it's Taylor Swift" and "Hey, it's Taylor." The trademark applications, filed by TAS Rights Management on behalf of Swift, include audio clips of Swift saying the two phrases as part of a promotion for her latest album.  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 泰勒·斯威夫特加强对AI模仿者的法律战争

title: Now YouTube TV lets you multiview any channel you want
summary: YouTube TV now offers fully customizable multiview, allowing users to mix and match up to four live streams, expanding beyond the limited preselected content options available since 2023.
content:
YouTube CEO Neal Mohan announced Tuesday that YouTube TV is getting "fully customizable" multiview. Users have "full control to mix and match live streams" and can "build the personalized viewing experience you've been asking for," Mohan says. You can pin up to four streams in your multiview window. 
YouTube initially introduced multiview in a more limited form in 2023 as a way to watch preselected streams of sports content like March Madness, and soon after expanded it to preselected streams on topics like news, business, and weather programming. Last year, YouTube rolled out an experiment letting users build their own multiviews with "sel …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: The FCC is going after the broadcast licenses of Disney-owned ABC stations
summary: The FCC ordered Disney's ABC stations to file for early license renewal as part of an investigation into the company's diversity and inclusion policies, a move that follows Trump's demand to fire Jimmy Kimmel.
content:
The Federal Communications Commission has ordered the ABC stations owned and operated by Disney to file for an early license renewal, as reported earlier by The New York Times. In a filing on Tuesday, the FCC claims it made the decision as part of an investigation into Disney's policies on diversity, equity, and inclusivity (DEI).
The move comes just one day after President Donald Trump demanded ABC fire late-night talk show host Jimmy Kimmel, who called Melania Trump an "expectant widow" in a skit, ahead of the alleged assassination attempt at the White House Correspondents' Dinner.
Disney wasn't set to renew its broadcast licenses until  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: Elon Musk takes the stand in high-profile trial against OpenAI
summary: Musk testified in his lawsuit against OpenAI CEO Sam Altman over disagreements on the company's mission and whether it should merge with Tesla, part of an ongoing legal battle that includes his competing xAI venture.
content:
Elon Musk officially began his testimony in the trial he has brought against OpenAI CEO Sam Altman and company president Greg Brockman.
The three were on the initial founding team of OpenAI, with Musk investing up to $38 million early on before the co-founders' relationship soured over disagreements over company structure and mission, including whether or not OpenAI should be folded into Musk-owned Tesla. Musk walked away and, years later, founded xAI - his own direct competitor to OpenAI, which is now owned by Musk's SpaceX. 
In recent years, Musk has filed no less than four different lawsuits against OpenAI, many of which have since been …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: You can get dragged into a police investigation by proximity alone — for now
summary: The Supreme Court heard arguments in Chatrie v. United States, examining police's use of "geofence warrants" that leverage location data from tech companies to identify crime suspects. The case raises critical privacy concerns as location data could expose Americans to police investigations based solely on proximity to a crime scene. At stake is the privacy of all location data and information stored with major tech companies.
content:
A years-old bank heist may soon have major privacy implications for every American who owns a cellphone. On Monday, the Supreme Court heard arguments in Chatrie v. United States, a case involving police's use of controversial "geofence warrants" to find and arrest Okello Chatrie, the suspect of a 2019 bank robbery outside Richmond, Virginia. At stake is how private your location data - and any other information you store with a large tech company - actually is. 
Chatrie was tracked down via the Location History feature on Google Maps, which can identify a person's location within three meters and refreshes every two minutes. Police served G …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 仅凭靠近就能被卷入警方调查——目前如此
zh.summary: 美国最高法院审理了Chatrie诉美国案，审视了警方使用"地理围栏令"的情况，这种令状利用科技公司的位置数据来识别犯罪嫌疑人。该案引发了严重的隐私担忧，因为位置数据可能仅因接近犯罪现场就让美国人被卷入警方调查。面临风险的是所有存储在主要科技公司的位置数据和信息的隐私。

title: Google Home makes it easier to understand why devices aren’t working
summary: Google Home's latest update provides instant account-relinking prompts when devices go offline, helping users quickly identify connection issues. The new Home Vitals program also helps developers monitor device integration health and prevent connection problems, improving overall smart home reliability.
content:
Thanks to Google Home's latest update, users may be able to get offline devices working again with less troubleshooting. Now, whenever a device goes offline, users may get "instant account-relinking prompts" in the app's device controller pages, which will tell users right away if an expired partner link is the reason one of their smart home devices isn't connected. 
Google's new "Home Vitals" program may also help prevent connection issues from causing devices to go offline to begin with. According to Google, its new Home Vitals website "enables developers to monitor their device integration health, identify connection errors, and proactiv …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Google Home 让用户更容易了解设备无法工作的原因
zh.summary: Google Home 的最新更新在设备离线时提供即时账户重新链接提示，帮助用户快速识别连接问题。新的 Home Vitals 程序还帮助开发者监控设备集成健康状况并防止连接问题，提高整体智能家居可靠性。

title: The Nex Playground gaming console is $60 off this week
summary: The Nex Playground motion-controlled gaming console is on sale for $239 (down from $299) through May 4th at major retailers, marking the best price in recent months. Despite complaints about tracking accuracy and high subscription costs, the discount makes the kid-friendly device slightly more affordable for families.
content:
One of the best-selling gaming consoles over the winter holidays was the Nex Playground, a small camera-equipped cube that runs motion-controlled games made primarily for kids. It got a $50 price increase this month — going from $249 to $299 — but shoppers are getting a brief discount during Amazon’s gaming week sale that lasts through May 4th. It’s currently selling for $239 at Amazon, Best Buy, and Walmart. While not as good as previous $199 sale prices, this is apparently as good as it’s going to get right now.
Nex Playground
The Nex Playground is a motion-controlled console that connects to your TV and uses a built-in camera and AI to track your movements as you play. Designed for ages five and up, it comes with games like Fruit Ninja and Whack-a-Mole Deluxe. You can download more games, including titles featuring popular characters like Elmo, with a paid Play Pass subscription.

Where to Buy:

 $299 $239 at Amazon
 $299 $239 at Best Buy
 $299 $239 at Walmart


The Nex Playground includes five games out of the box, but you can greatly expand its catalog with a Play Pass subscription. Some Play Pass games feature familiar kid-friendly characters like Bluey, Peppa Pig, Elmo, and more. My colleague Sean Hollister reviewed the Playground with the help of his two kiddos. For the most part, he thought the camera tracking was impressive, but it was sometimes disappointing. When the Playground messes up tracking fast-moving kids, smiles can turn into frowns. However, he thinks that the issues generally didn’t stop them from having fun together.
One of his biggest complaints about the Nex Playground was its high cost, not even considering the pricey Play Pass subscription (starting at $49 for three months, or $89 for a year) that ensures kids will have new games to play every so often. This deal doesn’t make the Playground affordable, but it makes things just a little less expensive.

zh.title: Nex Playground 游戏机本周优惠 60 美元
zh.summary: Nex Playground 运动控制游戏机在主要零售商处售价 239 美元（降价自 299 美元），优惠至 5 月 4 日，创最近数月最低价。尽管用户对追踪准确性和高额订阅费用有所抱怨，但此折扣使这款适合儿童的设备对家庭来说更加实惠。

The investment reflects the company's broader effort to expand beyond traditional dating platforms and capture emerging market segments.

summary: Google has signed a new contract expanding the Pentagon's access to its AI capabilities, following Anthropic's refusal to allow the Department of Defense to use its AI for domestic mass surveillance and autonomous weapons development. The move highlights diverging approaches among AI companies regarding military applications.
content: After Anthropic refused to allow the DoD to use its AI for domestic mass surveillance and autonomous weapons, Google has signed a new contract with the department.

title: The resurrected Commodore 64 is getting a facelift like the original
summary: The creators of the C64 Ultimate, an FPGA-based recreation of the iconic 1980s computer, have announced the C64C Ultimate with a redesigned slimmer case and modern aesthetic similar to the original 1986 Commodore 64C. The new version maintains functional compatibility while updating the visual design to appeal to retro computing enthusiasts.
content:
The C64C Ultimate features an HDMI port so it’s easy to connect to modern screens. | Image: Commodore	

The creators of the C64 Ultimate, a recreation of the iconic '80s personal computer that uses an FPGA chip to accurately replicate the original, have announced a follow-up version that continues in its predecessor's footsteps. The original Commodore 64 first debuted in 1982 and was followed by the Commodore 64C in 1986, which was functionally nearly identical but introduced a slimmer case and a more modern color scheme. It's the same story for the new Commodore 64C Ultimate. It gives the C64 Ultimate a welcome facelift, but there's no new functionality.
To make the C64C an authentic recreation of the original - at least on the outside - the …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: Logitech made a analog and mechanical keyboard in one
summary: Logitech's new G512 X keyboard features 39 hybrid switches that support both Hall effect analog and mechanical switches, allowing gamers to customize their typing experience without compromise. The keyboard aims to settle the ongoing debate between analog and mechanical switch preferences by enabling mix-and-match functionality.
content:
39 of its switches are hybrid, letting you insert Hall effect or mechanical switches. | Image: Logitech	

Each type of keyboard switch comes with perks and downsides. People who are used to typing on mechanical switches might dislike how quiet and squishy analog switches are by comparison. Regardless of your thoughts there, analog switches stand out because there are so many ways that gamers can customize how quickly they register inputs. Logitech's new wired G512 X model attempts to settle the debate by letting you mix-and-match them as you please. The company claims that 39 of this model's switches are compatible with "almost all" popular analog and 3-pin and 5-pin mechanical switches.
The G512 X is launching in the compact 75- and bigger 98- …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.summary: 罗技新推出的G512 X键盘配备39个混合开关，同时支持霍尔效应模拟和机械开关，让玩家无需妥协地自定义打字体验。该键盘旨在通过支持混合搭配功能来解决关于模拟和机械开关偏好的长期争议。

title: Paragon is not collaborating with Italian authorities probing spyware attacks, report says
summary: Israeli-American spyware maker Paragon has reportedly failed to cooperate with Italian authorities investigating hacks targeting journalists and activists, despite earlier promises to assist. The non-cooperation raises concerns about transparency and accountability in the spyware industry.
content: Despite promising to help determine what happened with the hacks targeting journalists and activists in Italy, Israeli American spyware maker Paragon has reportedly not responded to authorities’ requests for information.

zh.title: 报告称Paragon公司未与调查间谍软件攻击的意大利当局合作
zh.summary: 以色列-美国间谍软件制造商Paragon据报道未能与调查针对记者和活动人士黑客攻击的意大利当局合作，尽管该公司之前曾承诺提供协助。这种不合作引发了对间谍软件行业透明度和问责制的担忧。

title: Live updates from Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s court battle over the future of OpenAI
summary: Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI and Sam Altman began with opening arguments on April 27th, with Musk claiming the company abandoned its nonprofit mission to develop AI for humanity in favor of profit-seeking. The trial could significantly impact OpenAI's future structure and governance as a leading AI company.
content:
Sam Altman and Elon Musk are set to face off in a high-stakes trial that could alter the future of tech’s leading AI startup, OpenAI. In 2024, Musk filed a lawsuit accusing OpenAI of abandoning its founding mission of developing AI to benefit humanity and shifting focus to boosting profits instead. The trial began with jury selection on April 27th. Today, Elon Musk has arrived at the courthouse as the opening arguments began for both sides.
Musk was a cofounder of OpenAI and claims that Altman and cofounder Greg Brockman tricked him into giving the company money, only to turn their backs on their original goal. However, OpenAI says that “This lawsuit has always been a baseless and jealous bid to derail a competitor” in a bid to boost Musk’s own SpaceX / xAI / X companies that have launched Grok as a competitor to ChatGPT.
In his lawsuit, Musk is asking for the removal of Altman and Brockman, and for OpenAI to stop operating as a public benefit corporation. Musk has also demanded that OpenAI’s nonprofit receive up to $150 billion in damages he’s asking for if he wins the case.
Here’s all the latest on the trial between Musk and Altman:
“[Musk] demanded control, he demanded the ability to make all the decisions without regard to the other founders.”
			
OpenAI lawyers argue that Elon was right in the middle of discussions about a for-profit pivot.
			
“Musk was furious that OpenAI succeeded.”
			
OpenAI: Musk’s lawsuit is a “pageant of hypocrisy.”
			
Sam Altman’s “related party conflicted transactions” are how he made money on OpenAI, Molo says.
			
Technical difficulties.
			
OpenAI is like a museum store that has looted the Picassos and pocketed the profits.
			
AGI might be out of fashion in the AI world, but it will be at the center of this trial
			
“The defendants in this case stole a charity.”
			
Musk and Altman go to court
			
Good morning from the Musk v Altman line outside the courtroom.
			
Jury selection in Musk v. Altman: ‘People don’t like him’
			
We

zh.title: 埃隆·马斯克与山姆·奥特曼围绕OpenAI未来的法庭战争实时更新
zh.summary: 埃隆·马斯克对OpenAI和山姆·奥特曼的诉讼于4月27日开始开庭陈述，马斯克声称该公司放弃了为人类开发人工智能的非营利使命，转而追求利润最大化。这场诉讼可能对作为领先人工智能公司的OpenAI的未来结构和治理产生重大影响。

title: Apple TV’s new horror series is scarier because it’s also hilarious
summary: Apple TV's new horror-comedy series Widow's Bay premieres April 29th, blending horror and comedy to heighten the impact of both genres through strategic unpredictability and tonal shifts. The series stars Kate O'Flynn and explores how mixing horror with humor creates an engaging viewing experience where audiences remain emotionally vulnerable.
content:
Matthew Rhys and Stephen Root. | Image: Apple	

Kate O'Flynn views comedy and horror as "kind of the same thing." Both are at their best when they surprise - a laugh or a scare that comes out of nowhere hits the hardest. That's why, for the star of the new horror-comedy hybrid Widow's Bay, mixing up the genres makes perfect sense - they heighten each other. "You're never on steady ground," she says. "Your guard is down, and you're vulnerable to a laugh or a cry or a scream. It's all up for grabs."
Widow's Bay, which starts streaming on Apple TV on April 29th, tells the story of the titular island, which sits off the coast of New England. It has a rustic small-town charm and also happens  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Apple TV的新恐怖系列因为也很搞笑所以更吓人
zh.summary: Apple TV的新恐怖喜剧系列《寡妇湾》将于4月29日首映，通过战略性的不可预测性和基调转变来融合恐怖和喜剧元素，增强两种类型的影响力。该系列由凯特·奥弗琳主演，探讨了将恐怖与幽默融合如何创造吸引人的观影体验，使观众保持情感脆弱。

title: The latest Kindle Paperwhite drops to its best price all year
summary: The Kindle Paperwhite 12th generation is on sale for $134.99 (25% off) at major retailers, matching its best price of 2026 and offering waterproofing and adjustable warm frontlight at just $15 more than the base Kindle. The Paperwhite Signature Edition, featuring wireless charging and double storage, is also discounted to $164.99.
content:
The latest Kindle Paperwhite adds waterproofing, so you can read by the pool. | Image: The Verge	

Mother’s Day is coming up, and if you’re looking for a present, we recently published our gift guide with a range of ideas. One of those recommendations is the $109.99 entry-level Kindle, but right now you can buy the latest version of the higher-end Kindle Paperwhite with 16GB of storage and ads on sale starting at $134.99 ($25 off) at Amazon, Best Buy, and Target, making it the better buy. That’s its best price of the year, and $10 shy of the all-time low we last saw on Black Friday. The Kindle Paperwhite Signature Edition, which adds wireless charging and double the base storage, is also on sale for $164.99 ($25 off) at Amazon and Best Buy.
Kindle Paperwhite (12th-gen)

Where to Buy:

 $159.99 $134.99 at Amazon (with ads)
 $159.99 $134.99 at Best Buy (with ads)
 $159.99 $134.99 at Target (with ads)

For about $15 more, the Kindle Paperwhite adds waterproofing, so you (or mom) can read by the pool or in the bath without worrying. It also adds an adjustable warm frontlight that, in my experience, is easier on the eyes at night and less disruptive when you’re trying to wind down before bed. I also find its larger seven-inch display is slightly more comfortable to read, while battery life lasts months, so you won’t need to recharge it as often. 
Like the base Kindle, the Paperwhite also offers a sharp 300ppi display and USB-C support. It weighs less than the iPhone 17 Pro Max with enough storage to hold thousands of books — though fewer if you’re downloading audiobooks — so you can easily take your library on the go. And when you want something new to read, it’s incredibly easy to browse, buy, and download books directly from Amazon’s Kindle store, which is why it’s my go-to pick for those embedded in Amazon’s ecosystem.
Read our latest Kindle Paperwhite review.
Some more ways to save
Newegg is selling the PC edition of Marathon for $26.99 ($13 off) with code EPF4475. S

zh.title: 最新款Kindle Paperwhite降至全年最低价
zh.summary: Kindle Paperwhite 12代电子书阅读器在主要零售商处以134.99美元（优惠25%）出售，创2026年最低价纪录，配备防水和可调节温暖前光，仅比基础Kindle贵15美元。Paperwhite Signature版本采用无线充电和双倍存储，价格也降至164.99美元。

title: Claude can now plug directly into Photoshop, Blender, and Ableton
summary: Anthropic has launched connectors enabling Claude to integrate with creative software including Adobe Creative Cloud, Affinity, Blender, Ableton, and Autodesk tools. The connectors allow Claude to access apps, retrieve data, and perform actions within creative software, expanding the AI assistant's capabilities for creative professionals.
content:
Claude’s new Blender connector lets you debug scenes, build new tools, and batch-apply object changes directly from the chatbot interface. | Image: Anthropic	

Anthropic has launched a set of connectors for Claude that allow the AI chatbot to tap into popular creative software, including Adobe's Creative Cloud apps, Affinity, Blender, Ableton, Autodesk, and more. 
This marks the company's latest efforts to break into the creative industry following its launch of Claude Design earlier this month. The new connectors - which enable Claude to access apps, retrieve data, and take actions within connected services - are "designed to make it easier to use Claude for creative work," according to Anthropic, and can be used for specific functions in each app. 
The Adobe for creativity connector can draw fr …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Claude现在可以直接集成到Photoshop、Blender和Ableton中
zh.summary: Anthropic推出了连接器，使Claude能够与创意软件集成，包括Adobe Creative Cloud、Affinity、Blender、Ableton和Autodesk工具。这些连接器允许Claude访问应用、检索数据并在创意软件中执行操作，扩展了AI助手对创意专业人士的能力。

title: US Supreme Court appears split over controversial use of ‘geofence’ search warrants
summary: The U.S. Supreme Court is deliberating on the legality of geofence search warrants that allow police to identify suspects through dragnet database searches of tech companies. The court's ruling will significantly impact privacy rights and law enforcement surveillance practices.
content: The U.S. top court is expected to rule on whether to allow police to identify criminal suspects by dragnet searching the databases of tech giants.

zh.title: 美国最高法院在有争议的"地理围栏"搜查令使用上意见分歧
zh.summary: 美国最高法院正在审议地理围栏搜查令的合法性，该搜查令允许警察通过对科技公司的大规模数据库搜索来识别嫌疑人。法院的判决将显著影响隐私权和执法部门的监视做法。

title: Australia forces Big Tech firms to pay for news or face a 2.25% tax
summary: Australia has implemented a regulatory framework requiring major tech platforms to pay for news content or face a 2.25% tax on revenue, with effective rates potentially dropping to 1.5% if sufficient media licensing deals are reached. The policy aims to generate A$200-250 million annually to support Australian journalism.
content: The more deals platforms make with media outlets, the less they pay. If enough agreements go through, that effective rate drops to 1.5%, which could generate between A$200 million and A$250 million back into Australian journalism.

zh.title: 澳大利亚迫使科技巨头为新闻付费或面临2.25%税收
zh.summary: 澳大利亚实施了一项监管框架，要求主要科技平台为新闻内容付费，否则将面临收入的2.25%税收，如果达成足够的媒体许可协议，有效税率可能降至1.5%。该政策旨在每年产生2亿至2.5亿澳元，以支持澳大利亚新闻业。

title: Lovable launches its vibe-coding app on iOS and Android
summary: Lovable has released its AI-powered vibe-coding platform on iOS and Android, enabling developers to build web apps and websites through natural language descriptions on mobile devices. The app expands access to low-code/no-code development tools for developers on the go.
content: The app allows developers to vibe code web apps and websites on the go.

zh.title: Lovable在iOS和Android上推出vibe-coding应用
zh.summary: Lovable在iOS和Android上发布了其由AI驱动的vibe-coding平台，使开发人员能够通过移动设备上的自然语言描述来构建网络应用和网站。该应用为移动开发人员扩展了低代码/无代码开发工具的访问权限。

title: Google Translate can now help you with pronunciation
summary: Google Translate has introduced an AI-powered pronunciation practice tool that analyzes user speech and provides instant feedback to help improve language learning accuracy. The feature is currently available for Android users in the US and India for English, Spanish, and Hindi.
content:
The pronunciation guides are written out phonetically to give you a fighting chance. | Image by Google / The Verge	

Google has launched a new AI-powered feature for Translate that can help you correct and practice your enunciation when learning a new language. The "pronunciation practice" tool analyzes your speech to provide instant feedback on how to improve before jumping into an actual conversation in your chosen language. 
The result bears some resemblance to pronunciation features on Duolingo's language learning app. Google Translate pronunciation practice is available for Android users in the US and India starting today in English, Spanish and Hindi. Google hasn't announced if or when it will be expanded to other regions or made available for iOS u …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Google翻译现在可以帮助您进行发音练习
zh.summary: Google翻译推出了一个由AI驱动的发音练习工具，可以分析用户语音并提供即时反馈，帮助改进语言学习的准确性。该功能目前为美国和印度的Android用户提供英语、西班牙语和印地语的使用。

title: GitHub will start charging Copilot users based on their actual AI usage
summary: GitHub is shifting its Copilot pricing model from flat-rate subscriptions to usage-based billing, citing escalating inference costs from heavy users. The change reflects the mounting expenses associated with providing AI assistance at scale.
content: GitHub says it can no longer absorb "escalating inference cost" from it heaviest AI users.

zh.title: GitHub将根据实际AI使用情况对Copilot用户收费
zh.summary: GitHub正在将Copilot的定价模式从固定费率转变为使用量计费，原因是来自重度用户的推理成本不断上升。这一变化反映了大规模提供AI协助所带来的持续增长的成本。

title: Founder of Shark Tank-backed startup Scholly sues his acquirer Sallie Mae
summary: Chris Gray, founder of the Shark Tank-backed student loan marketplace Scholly, is suing his startup's acquirer Sallie Mae for wrongful termination. Gray also alleges that Sallie Mae illegally sells student data through a subsidiary—claims the company denies and has vowed to contest in court.
content: Chris Gray is suing his startup’s acquirer, Sallie Mae, for wrongful termination and alleging it's selling student data through a subsidiary. Sallie Mae denies the allegations and vows to fight.

zh.title: 《鲨鱼坦克》支持的初创公司Scholly创始人起诉收购方Sallie Mae
zh.summary: 《鲨鱼坦克》支持的学生贷款市场Scholly创始人克里斯·格雷正在起诉其初创公司的收购方Sallie Mae公司非法解雇。格雷还指控Sallie Mae通过子公司非法出售学生数据——该公司否认了这些指控，并表示将在法庭上予以答辩。

title: Electrical current might be the key to a better cup of coffee
summary: University of Oregon scientists have repurposed a battery-testing tool to accurately measure coffee's flavor profile using electrical current. This innovative approach could improve scientific understanding of coffee's sensory characteristics.
content: University of Oregon scientists repurposed battery-testing tool to better measure coffee's flavor profile

zh.title: 电流可能是制作更好咖啡的关键
zh.summary: 俄勒冈大学的科学家重新利用电池测试工具，使用电流准确测量咖啡的风味特征。这一创新方法可能会改进对咖啡感官特性的科学理解。

title: Apple introduces a cheaper option for App Store subscriptions
summary: Apple is introducing a new App Store subscription tier allowing developers to offer lower monthly pricing in exchange for a 12-month upfront commitment. The option provides developers with a competitive pricing strategy while encouraging longer user retention.
content: Apple is adding a new subscription option that lets app developers offer lower monthly pricing in exchange for a 12-month commitment.

zh.title: Apple推出App Store订阅的更便宜选项
zh.summary: Apple正在推出一个新的App Store订阅层级,允许开发者提供更低的月度价格,以换取12个月的预付承诺。该选项为开发者提供了竞争性的定价策略,同时鼓励更长时间的用户留存。

title: The great American data center divide
summary: Many rural American communities are expressing strong opposition to AI-related data center infrastructure development. The resistance reflects a growing divide over where computing infrastructure should be built and how communities are impacted.
content: Many rural communities are viscerally opposed to AI infrastructure.

zh.title: 美国数据中心的大分裂
zh.summary: 许多美国农村社区对人工智能相关的数据中心基础设施开发表示强烈反对。这种阻力反映了计算基础设施应该在何处建立以及社区如何受到影响的日益扩大的分歧。

title: A billion miles in less than a decade: GM's Super Cruise reaches a milestone
summary: General Motors' Super Cruise hands-free driver assistance system has surpassed one billion miles, marking a major milestone for autonomous driving technology. Though notable, Super Cruise currently operates only on geofenced highways and requires driver attentiveness.
content: The hands-free, eyes-on driver assist only works on geofenced highways.

zh.title: 不到十年十亿英里:通用汽车Super Cruise达到里程碑
zh.summary: 通用汽车公司的Super Cruise免提驾驶辅助系统已经超过10亿英里,这是自动驾驶技术的重要里程碑。虽然值得注意,但Super Cruise目前仅在地理围栏高速公路上运行,并需要驾驶员保持警觉。

title: Snapchat brings AI-powered conversational advertising to its app
summary: Snapchat is launching AI-powered brand agents enabling conversational advertising directly within the app. Users can interact with these agents to ask questions and receive product recommendations in an engaging, chat-based format.
content: Users will be able to chat with a brand's AI agent to do things like ask questions and get recommendations.

zh.title: Snapchat推出AI驱动的对话式广告应用
zh.summary: Snapchat正在推出AI驱动的品牌代理，在应用内直接启用对话式广告。用户可以与这些代理互动，提出问题并以引人入胜的聊天格式获得产品推荐。

title: YouTube is testing an AI-powered search feature that shows guided answers
summary: YouTube is rolling out an AI-powered search feature to Premium subscribers in the U.S. that provides AI-generated guided answers to queries. The opt-in feature is currently available to a limited audience as YouTube tests the new capability.
content: YouTube is rolling out the new AI search feature to Premium subscribers in the U.S. on an opt-in basis.

zh.title: YouTube正在测试显示引导答案的AI驱动搜索功能
zh.summary: YouTube正在向美国的高级订阅者推出AI驱动的搜索功能，提供AI生成的引导答案。这个可选功能目前仅向有限的用户开放，YouTube正在测试这项新功能。

title: BCI startup Neurable looks to license its ‘mind-reading’ tech for consumer wearables
summary: Neurable, a brain-computer interface startup specializing in non-invasive neural data collection, is seeking licensing partnerships for its technology in consumer wearables. The company believes its neural capabilities could enable new applications across consumer devices.
content: The startup specializes in "non-invasive" "mind-reading" tech — a kind of neural data collection that, its CEO hopes, will have all sorts of consumer applications.

zh.title: 脑机接口创业公司Neurable计划为消费者可穿戴设备许可其"读心"技术
zh.summary: 脑机接口创业公司Neurable专门从事非侵入式神经数据收集，正在寻求在消费者可穿戴设备中的技术许可合作伙伴关系。该公司认为其神经能力可以在消费者设备中实现新的应用。

title: Red Hat’s OpenClaw maintainer just made enterprise Claw deployments a lot safer
summary: Tank OS has developed a containerized solution for deploying Red Hat's OpenClaw AI agents more safely and reliably in enterprise environments. The solution is particularly valuable for organizations managing large fleets of AI agents in production.
content: Tank OS puts OpenClaw AI agents into a container that lets it run reliably and more safely, especially for those running fleets of them.

zh.title: Red Hat 的 OpenClaw 维护者刚刚大大提高了企业级 Claw 部署的安全性
zh.summary: Tank OS 开发了一个容器化解决方案，用于在企业环境中更加安全和可靠地部署 Red Hat 的 OpenClaw AI 代理。该解决方案对于管理生产环境中大规模 AI 代理的组织特别有价值。

title: Otter’s new feature lets users search across their enterprise tools
summary: Otter has launched a new search feature enabling users to search across their enterprise tools and released a Windows app capable of capturing meeting notes without participants joining the meeting.
content: Otter is also releasing a new Windows app that can capture meeting notes without joining one

zh.title: Otter推出新功能，让用户可以跨企业工具进行搜索
zh.summary: Otter推出了一项新的搜索功能，使用户能够在其企业工具中进行搜索，并发布了一个Windows应用程序，可以在不需要参与者加入会议的情况下捕获会议笔记。

title: Start with the sensors, then design the rest: How Zoox built its robotaxi
summary: Zoox built its robotaxi by prioritizing sensor design as the foundation before developing other components, with the resulting bidirectional design offering clear operational advantages for autonomous taxi service.
content: The bidirectional design has some clear advantages for a working taxi.

zh.title: 从传感器开始再设计其他部分：Zoox如何打造其自动驾驶出租车
zh.summary: Zoox通过优先考虑传感器设计作为基础，然后开发其他组件来构建其机器人出租车，所得到的双向设计为自动驾驶出租车服务提供了明显的操作优势。

title: Google and Pentagon reportedly agree on deal for ‘any lawful’ use of AI
summary: Google has signed a classified agreement allowing the US Department of Defense to use its AI models for any lawful government purpose, placing it alongside OpenAI and xAI, though the deal comes amid employee concerns about potential misuse.
content:
Google has signed a classified deal that allows the US Department of Defense to use its AI models for "any lawful government purpose," The Information reports. The agreement was reported less than a day after Google employees demanded CEO Sundar Pichai block the Pentagon from using its AI amid concerns that it would be used in "inhumane or extremely harmful ways."
If the agreement is confirmed, it would place Google alongside OpenAI and xAI, which have also made classified AI deals with the US government. Anthropic was also among that list until it was blacklisted by the Pentagon for refusing the Department of Defense's demands to remove we …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 据报道，谷歌和美国防部就人工智能的"任何合法"使用达成协议
zh.summary: 谷歌签署了一份机密协议，允许美国国防部为任何合法的政府目的使用其人工智能模型，这使其与OpenAI和xAI并列，尽管该协议是在员工对潜在滥用的担忧中达成的。

title: Neanderthal brains measure up to ours—literally
summary: New research shows Neanderthal brains were comparable in size to modern human brains, with the physical differences between the two being largely superficial rather than functionally significant.
content: The differences between our brains and Neanderthals' were likely cosmetic.

zh.title: 尼安德特人的大脑与我们的一样大
zh.summary: 新研究表明尼安德特人的大脑在大小上与现代人类的大脑相当，两者之间的物理差异在很大程度上是表面上的，而不是功能上的差异。

title: Attack of the killer script kiddies
summary: At DARPA's Artificial Intelligence Cyber Challenge, AI-powered bug-finding systems not only identified most of the intentional flaws injected into 54 million lines of code but also discovered additional vulnerabilities, highlighting AI's growing role in cybersecurity.
content:
Last August, some of the best cybersecurity teams in the business gathered in Las Vegas to demonstrate the strength of their AI bug-finding systems at DARPA's Artificial Intelligence Cyber Challenge (AIxCC). The tools had scanned 54 million lines of actual software code that DARPA had injected with artificial flaws. The teams were capable enough to identify most of the artificial bugs, but their automated tools went beyond that - they found more than a dozen bugs that DARPA hadn't inserted at all.
Even before the security earthquake that Anthropic delivered this month with Claude Mythos - the new AI model that seems to find vulnerabilities  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 杀手级脚本小子的攻击
zh.summary: 在DARPA的人工智能网络挑战赛中，由人工智能驱动的漏洞查找系统不仅识别了注入到5400万行代码中的大部分故意缺陷，还发现了额外的漏洞，突显了人工智能在网络安全中日益增长的作用。

title: It’s a busy time for sci-fi, but don’t miss Aphelion
summary: With major sci-fi releases saturating entertainment, the indie adventure game Aphelion offers a quieter, story-focused alternative that complements the current blockbuster sci-fi landscape.
content:
The last few weeks have bordered on overwhelming for science fiction fans. While Project Hail Mary is dominating the box office, For All Mankind is currently in the midst of its penultimate season, with a spinoff streaming next month. When it comes to games, Capcom kicked off a new sci-fi franchise with Pragmata, and Housemarque is about to launch the haunting shooter Saros. With all of that going on, it'd be easy to miss Aphelion. It's a comparatively small and quiet adventure game, one focused more on storytelling than gameplay. But that also makes it a perfect complement to all of the current blockbusters, offering something much more int …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 科幻作品繁忙，但别错过Aphelion
zh.summary: 随着主要科幻作品饱和娱乐市场，独立冒险游戏Aphelion提供了一个更安静、故事驱动的替代品，补充了当前大片科幻景观。

title: Microsoft Office can now be controlled with Logitech’s MX Creative Console
summary: Logitech expanded Productivity Plugins for its MX accessory line to include Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint), Slack, and Notion, complementing existing support for creative apps. Users can now quickly access shortcuts and actions through the company's Actions Ring interface on devices like the MX Creative Console.
content:
Logitech’s Creative Console and other MX accessories are now compatible with several productivity apps. | Image: Logitech	

Logitech has announced a new suite of Productivity Plugins for its entire MX line of accessories, including its Stream Deck alternative, the MX Creative Console. Since the console launched in September 2024, Logitech has been expanding its capabilities with plug-ins that support creativity-focused apps such as Final Cut Pro, Adobe Lightroom, and Figma. That is now expanding to include productivity apps, such as Microsoft Office's Word, Excel, and PowerPoint, as well as Slack and Notion.
Shortcuts, actions, and specific tools in those apps can be quickly accessed using Logitech's Actions Ring menus, which are supported by accessories like th …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Microsoft Office 现可通过 Logitech MX Creative Console 控制
zh.summary: Logitech 为其 MX 配件系列扩展了生产力插件，现已支持 Microsoft Office（Word、Excel、PowerPoint）、Slack 和 Notion，进一步完善了对创意应用的支持。用户现在可以通过该公司在 MX Creative Console 等设备上的 Actions Ring 界面快速访问快捷方式和操作。

title: Drizzle on top: a new high-end dog food brand is coming for the 1%
summary: Golden Child is launching as a premium dog food brand targeting affluent consumers with fresh frozen meal systems and specialty products, backed by $37 million in funding. The startup enters a growing market for luxury pet food offerings.
content: Golden Child is launching with two "five-star" products: a fresh frozen meal system and, more intriguingly, a "drizzle." It has also raised $37 million in funding.

zh.title: 新高端狗粮品牌来袭，瞄准1%的富人
zh.summary: Golden Child 正推出高端狗粮品牌，以新鲜冷冻膳食系统和专业产品为主打，目标是富裕消费者，并获得 3700 万美元融资。这家初创公司进入了快速增长的奢侈宠物食品市场。

title: Jury selection in Musk v. Altman: ‘People don’t like him’
summary: Jury selection began in Elon Musk's lawsuit against Sam Altman over alleged broken OpenAI promises, revealing widespread negative sentiment toward Musk among prospective jurors. The sentiment could influence the trial's outcome in this high-profile tech industry dispute.
content:
On Monday, the courtroom battle between Elon Musk and Sam Altman over alleged broken promises at OpenAI started, as usual, with jury selection. The only tricky part? A lot of the prospective jurors already have an opinion about Elon Musk, and it's not a good one.
The Verge reporter Elizabeth Lopatto, who was there at the courthouse, quoted statements from some of the juror questionnaires: 
"Elon Musk is a greedy, racist, homophobic piece of garbage."
"Elon Musk is a world-class jerk."
"I very much dislike Tesla. As a woman of color, I am very aware of the damaging statements and actions Elon Musk has enacted and been a part of."
M …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 穆斯克诉奥特曼案陪审团遴选："人们不喜欢他"
zh.summary: 埃隆·穆斯克与山姆·奥特曼关于 OpenAI 承诺的诉讼陪审团遴选已开始，显示潜在陪审团成员对穆斯克存在广泛的负面看法。这种负面情绪可能会影响这场科技行业高调纠纷的审判结果。

title: India’s Snabbit closes $56M round as investor interest in on-demand home services heats up
summary: Indian on-demand home services platform Snabbit closed a $56 million funding round and now processes over 40,000 daily jobs across expanding cities and services. The company has achieved improved cost efficiency as investor interest in the sector heats up.
content: Snabbit now processes over 40,000 daily jobs and has cut costs sharply as it expands across cities and services.

zh.title: 印度Snabbit完成5600万美元融资，投资者对按需家居服务的兴趣升温
zh.summary: 印度按需家居服务平台Snabbit完成了5600万美元的融资轮，目前在不断扩展的城市和服务中每天处理超过40000项工作。随着投资者对该行业兴趣升温，该公司实现了成本效率的提升。

title: Put it in pencil: NASA's Artemis III mission will launch no earlier than late 2027
summary: NASA's Artemis III lunar mission will not launch before late 2027, with SpaceX and Blue Origin confirming readiness of their lunar landers by that timeline. The delay marks a significant pushback in humanity's planned return to the moon.
content: SpaceX and Blue Origin tell NASA their lunar landers will be ready for Artemis III in late 2027.

zh.title: 用铅笔记下来：NASA的阿尔忒弥斯三号任务最早将在2027年末推出
zh.summary: NASA的阿尔忒弥斯三号月球任务将不会在2027年末之前推出，SpaceX和蓝色起源证实他们的月球着陆器在该时间表内已做好准备。这一延迟标志着人类计划重返月球的重大延期。

title: Google is testing AI chatbot search for YouTube
summary: Google is testing a conversational AI search experience on YouTube available to Premium subscribers in the US age 18+. The feature lets users ask natural language questions and returns longform videos, Shorts, and text results through an 'Ask YouTube' button.
content:
Google is trying out an AI Mode-like search experience for YouTube. The company is now testing "a new way to search on YouTube that feels more like a conversation," with results pulling in things like longform videos, YouTube Shorts, and text about what you're searching for. The "experiment" is now available if you're a YouTube Premium subscriber in the US who is 18 or older.
I turned it on for my account. Now, in the search bar, I see an "Ask YouTube" button, and clicking the search bar shows prompts to ask like "funny baby elephant playing clips," "summary of the rules of volleyball," and "short history of the Apollo 11 moon landing." If  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Google正在为YouTube测试AI聊天机器人搜索
zh.summary: Google正在为美国18岁以上的Premium订阅者测试YouTube上的对话式AI搜索体验。该功能允许用户提出自然语言问题，并通过"Ask YouTube"按钮返回长视频、短视频和文本结果。
